summary: Created dropoff_analyzer.py with analyze/report subcommands. 7/19 calls (36.8%) are drop-offs under 60s. Classifications: 2 test_call, 2 lost_interest, 1 immediate_hangup, 1 wrong_number, 1 greeting_only. Wasted cost: $0.17. Rule-based classification using duration + endedReason + transcript presence.
broadcast: Drop-off rate is 36.8% (7/19). Most common reasons: test calls and lost interest. SIP-completed calls are connection tests. Drop-offs cluster in evening hours.
